required_operator_inputs: user explicitly chose the broader long-term runtime-source widening path for Phase 2
land the initial Source library honestly through real runtime owners and bridge support rather than catalog-only rows
preserve the existing exact legacy tuples while relaxing the exact-tuple choke point for programmable source expansion
keep root_proximity family-gated and fail-closed on fractal families that do not provide basin/root identity
forbidden_operator_prompts: pretend escape_magnitude, orbit_stripe, or root_proximity are shipped without runtime owners
keep the advanced window and schema binding limited to three exact source tuples after the user chose the broader refactor
break the old smooth_escape, phase, or iteration_bands outputs while widening the source layer
make root_proximity selectable on families where basin/root identity is not available
ask the user to re-arbitrate the broader-vs-narrower Phase 2 choice

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The advanced color library foundation Phase 2 runtime-source expansion contract validates successfully
The advanced color library foundation Phase 2 plan stays synchronized during runtime-source expansion
